flowContents.comments: This flow consumes the data from Redis using FetchDistributedMapCache and then place them on JDBC destination.

Pool - Num Tests Per Eviction Run.displayName: Pool - Num Tests Per Eviction Run
Pool - Num Tests Per Eviction Run.name: Pool - Num Tests Per Eviction Run

labels.label: Here we are passing the hashvalue attribute's value to the Cache Entry Identifier which will be used to fetch the data from redis
Placing the records at JDBC destination table. You can define record reader according to your need
hash.value attribute's value must be the key whose value you want to fetch from Redis

flowContents.name: RedisToJDBC
